summary: Tested School Student Portal end-to-end: OTP auth, profile GET/PATCH, payment receipts, and full UI flow. All 15 backend tests and all frontend flows passed.

minor.issue: No test phone bypass for 9876543210 - relies on AiSensy being available. Works in current env because AISENSY_API_KEY is set, but if AiSensy fails, user cannot proceed to OTP step even though verify-otp has a 1111 bypass.

issues: Download button (standalone) only shows download icon with no label - may confuse users about what it does
Unused 'activeTab' state initialized to 'receipts' in SchoolStudentDashboard.jsx - there are no actual tab components
Missing data-testid attributes on Edit, Save, Cancel, Logout buttons - makes automated testing harder

action_items: LOW: Add test phone bypass in send-otp endpoint for phone 9876543210 to ensure testing always works even if AiSensy is down
LOW: Add data-testid attributes to Edit/Save/Cancel/Logout buttons in SchoolStudentDashboard.jsx
LOW: Remove unused activeTab state from SchoolStudentDashboard.jsx or implement actual tabs
LOW: Add label text to standalone download button in payment list for better UX
critical_code_review_comments: send-otp endpoint has no bypass for test phone 9876543210; only verify-otp has the 1111 bypass - inconsistent test support
SchoolStudentDashboard missing data-testid on interactive elements (Edit, Save, Logout buttons)
Dead code: activeTab state initialized to 'receipts' but never used for tab switching
Receipt download creates .txt file - acceptable for MVP but PDF would be better for user experience
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. One PAID payment exists for 9876543210 (SCH_cc3bde5d_23eebd45 at TEST_Reference_School). Profile shows Test Student, Grade 8-A.
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Student Portal is fully functional. Login at /school-student/login with phone 9876543210 and OTP 1111 (MOCKED). Dashboard at /school-student/dashboard shows profile and payment history. PAID payment shows View/Download receipt buttons. Receipt modal and download work. Profile edit/save works. Logout works and clears session.

tested_features.receipt_modal: WORKING (shows Payment Successful, all payment details)
tested_features.session_protection: WORKING (dashboard redirects to login without session)
